description: '''Amapiano''' is a genre of music from [[South Africa]] that became popular in the early 2020s. It is a hybrid of [[kwaito]],  [[deep house]], [[gqom]], [[jazz]], [[Soul music|soul]], and [[Lounge music|lounge]] music characterized by [[synthesizer|synths]] and wide, percussive [[bassline]]s. The word "amapiano" derives from the [[IsiZulu]] word for "[[piano]]s".
